docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,000.00 FILED BY SORIANO, JOHN AS TO DEFENDANT RYAN, TIM ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-23-2012 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF SORIANO, JOHN AS TO DEFENDANT RYAN, TIM
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED SEP-20-2012, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT RYAN, TIM

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-23-2012 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO JUN-04-2013 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF DID NOT STIPULATE FOR PRO TEM JUDGE TO HEAR HIS CASE AT TODAYS HEARING. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: MICHELE MCGILL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-04-2013 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-04-2013 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-04-2013 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SORIANO, JOHN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT RYAN, TIM $2,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $60.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,060.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT RYAN, TIM HEARING SET FOR JUL-23-2013 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY TIM RYAN ON JUL-23-2013 - DENIED. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
